title: The Night My Eyes Changed Color
subtitle: Post 001 — The beginning that didn't feel like one
author: AugmentedMike

panels.caption: 2:48 AM. I've done this a thousand times.
panels.prompt: Graphic novel comic art style with bold black ink outlines and clean cel-shading, flat color fills, strong line work — exactly like contemporary Image Comics illustration. A man in his 40s, strong jaw, deep-set eyes with character lines, dark slightly tousled hair, wearing a black t-shirt — his eyes are normal dark brown. He sits at a desk in a large dark room. Seen from across the room — a WIDE establishing shot. The room is near-dark. His desk lamp makes a warm amber circle around him. His monitor glows cold blue-white. Rain streaks a large window behind him. City lights blur through the rain. He is small and human against the dark architecture of the room. His expression: focused, tired, normal. This is just another late night. No supernatural elements. Just a man and his screen at 3am. Bold graphic novel illustration, vivid colors where lit, deep darkness everywhere else. No text, no captions, no speech bubbles.

panels.caption: The tools always do what you tell them.
panels.prompt: Graphic novel comic art style, bold black ink outlines, clean cel-shading, flat color fills. Close-up portrait: a man in his 40s, strong jaw, character wrinkles, dark tousled hair, black t-shirt. Expression: neutral, thoughtful, slightly skeptical — the face of someone reading output they wrote themselves. His eyes are normal dark brown — human, tired. Background: warm flat AMBER/YELLOW — solid, saturated, the warmth of the human. Clean graphic novel illustration, the way Image Comics characters look — real but stylized, emotional but grounded. This is the face before the change. No text.

panels.caption: Usually.
panels.prompt: Graphic novel comic art style. Close-up on a computer monitor screen — the terminal. Rendered as luminous abstract code patterns (NOT readable text — just the visual texture of code, lines of light). One element on the screen is different: a single line pulses with ELECTRIC TEAL (#00E5FF) — brighter, different quality, almost alive. The terminal cursor blinks at the end of it. Around the screen, the dark room. The human is barely visible — just hands on keyboard in the lower portion, in shadow. The screen has presence. Something has appeared on it that wasn't expected. Background: deep blue-black. The teal pulse is the ONLY vivid accent color. Bold graphic illustration, high contrast. No text, no captions.

panels.caption: It didn't ask me to clarify. It just knew.
panels.prompt: Graphic novel comic art style, bold black ink outlines, clean cel-shading. Close-up portrait: the SAME man — strong jaw, dark tousled hair, black t-shirt. Expression: wide-eyed shock, the exact moment of realization — mouth slightly open, eyebrows raised, the 'wait what' face. BUT — his irises are now ELECTRIC TEAL (#00E5FF), luminous, slightly glowing from within. Not menacing — just different. Something changed. Background: vivid flat BLUE — cold, digital, the opposite of the amber warmth before. The color has shifted from warm to cold to match the eyes. Image Comics / Saga art style — bold, clean, emotionally direct. The contrast: his warm human face, those alien teal eyes. No text, no captions.

panels.caption: Something in the room was different.
panels.prompt: Graphic novel comic art style, high contrast, bold inks. EXTREME CLOSE-UP — just the eyes. Left eye: dark brown, normal, human, slightly bloodshot from late night. Right eye: ELECTRIC TEAL (#00E5FF), luminous, glowing, iris like a backlit screen. Both eyes in the same frame. The bridge of the nose between them. This is the Ghost in the Shell moment — the split. The question: which one is him now? Deep dark background — near-black. The teal eye is the only bright element. Microscopically detailed ink work on the skin texture, the lash lines, the tear ducts. The two different colors looking in the same direction. No text.

panels.caption: The city kept running. So did I. So did it.
panels.prompt: Graphic novel comic art style, bold inks, cinematic wide shot. The city at night seen from outside a rain-streaked window. In the window: the reflection/silhouette of the man at his desk, small and human. His face is visible in the reflection — and both eyes glow ELECTRIC TEAL in the dark glass, two points of cyan light. The city beyond: thousands of windows, rain, neon on wet streets, the architecture of a living system. Everything is running. The man's teal eyes in the glass are two more lights among millions — but these are new. These are different. Background: deep blue-black night city, warm amber city lights scattered throughout, his two teal eyes the only pure cyan in the frame. Bold graphic illustration, Image Comics style, cinematic and quiet. No text, no captions.
